channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Law of the jungle — 180 replies — 364.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Law of the jungle

Open thread • Replies: 180 • Updated: 2026-06-16 16:57 UTC

OP

>I am a million billion trillionair-
>BAM BAM BAM
>STAB STAB STAB
W-WHY AM I DYING I AM RICH AND HAVE MONEY ROCKETS CARS AIEEEEEE
P-PLEASE SIRE SAVE M-
>BAM BAM BAM
NOOOO WHY IS MONEY USELESS WHY WHY WHY WAAAAH PLEASE SIR
I WILL GIVE YOU EVERYTHIN-
>STAB HIS KIDS
AAAAAAH MY KIDDIES MY BLOODLINE WHY WHY
PLEASE SIR THE TRILLION MONEY
ACK

Early replies (first 3)

62359354
>>62359336
a mentally buck busted normie is going to say """the law""" grants the rich physical immunity.... and even if it doesn't, they have like, body guards who are omnipotent, omniscient, and omnipresent. you can't do ANYTHING to the rich!!!! it's literally impossible!!!!!

62359360
>>62359336
We live in capitalism and I'm protected by the pigs u need to learn how to move nigga

62359387
>nigger tier envy thread
>/biz/

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62371454
>>62371441
you didn't answer the question. >>62360783

62371459
>>62371449
YOU
WONT
DO
SHIT

62371463
>>62371440
at least i have a house

62371468
>>62371459
I'm tracing your IP as we speak. Prepare for the storm that is coming, maggot

62371472
watch out yall the "people" are trying to uhhhhhhhhh idk

62372199
i stand undefeated

62372328
>>62372199
>undefeated
Then you are clearly not mr john communism

62373377
>>62371463
Slave mentality. If you are not born upper class you'll never be more than a piece of cattle to them. To be extracted, abused, slaughtered, and thrown onto the rubbish pile of the forgotten.
The only way to regain your honour and dignity is by fighting them to the death and replacing their ranks entirely with your own.
They like to claim that they in their positions because they're smarter and more capable. They are not. They are more ruthless, more violent and that's all it ever was!

62373388
We have nothing to lose but our chains! What do we have else? Our lives? Life will pass before you know it, make it count you cowards!

62373610
class cucks went real quiet

62373692
>>62365676
>lectures about being a sociopath for buying and selling stuff
>unironically aspires to murder strangers in cold blood out of envy
your brain on communism

62373696
>>62373692
welcome to the real world, pussy
Those "strangers" are vampires drunk on my blood and the blood of my brothers and my ancestors

62373718
>>62373696
Nothing "real world" about uttering two antithetical ideas in the same breath. It also doesn't make you tough. Just retarded.

62373727
>>62373718
I hope you know what happens to class traitors :)

62373746
>>62373727
>whining on 4chan since 2007
>but now his depressed drunken tough talk is totez 4 realz
you won't do shit

62373751
>>62373746
and you're too pussy to even talk shit about your masters

62373760
i suddenly feel very horny

62373773
>>62373751
>toothless impotent rage makes me a badass!
kek

62374025
>>62373773
>being le stoic cuck makes me better

62374136
>>62359336
what are you saying? That the entire 2 trillion value of SpaceX is based on one man who is vulnerable to any number of Luigis and it would be pretty foolish to invest with that level of risk?

62374949
>>62370324
>revolutionary
I see you still haven't responded to >>62368447
NYPA, nigger.

62374958
>>62371364
he's only here to sow dissent. is either
a) paid shill
b) tranny
c) on antidepressants
d) vaxxed
or some combination.
>>62371449
take your meds.

62374966
>>62373377
>>62373388
>>62373610
this board is dead you idiot.
go jump off a bridge so we can use that as the signal for le ebin revolution.

62374996
>>62373718
>Nothing "real world" about uttering two antithetical ideas in the same breath.
the real world is rife with contradiction and inconsistency. just look at this thread. you have poor retard manual laborers swearing allegiance to a system that is strangling what's left of the middle class to death.

62375795
>>62374996
What i meant is that the simultaneously held antitheses are not and cannot be accurately reflective of any real world property or state. I didn't mean to imply that people or societies are consistent. Communist retards have been the ultimate exemplars refuting that assertion for a hundred years.

62375879
>>62359400
>half a dozen fags with glocks
Bodyguard this

62375918
>>62359479
>rothschild way more sympathic

62375922
>>62359403
Yes. In the forest the strong dominates.

62376058
>>62374949
I have nothing to say to you, it's known where you stand

62376070
>>62374966
Capital must be delighted so many dumb brainwashed fucks like you roam the earth
You're not upper class, faggot, you're a worthless slave like I am

item.title: "He didn't buy SPCX" edition >Educational sites: >Financial TV Streams: >Charts: >Screeners: >Gambling: >Pre-Market and… — 80 replies — 165.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
"He didn't buy SPCX" edition >Educational sites: >Financial TV Streams: >Charts: >Screeners: >Gambling: >Pre-Market and…

Open thread • Replies: 80 • Updated: 2026-06-16 16:57 UTC

OP

"He didn't buy SPCX" edition

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners:
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars:
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101:
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

>Previous >>62372298

Early replies (first 3)

62373348
I am still making money off of sneedisk
>should've bought more than one SPCX edition
thank you for your attention to this matter

62373354
>>62373348
why so edgy

62373362
looks like it's headed back up after that 230 le correction

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62375404
ill sell when it gets to 250
sound fair?

62375406
>>62375235
I sold right as this guy fomoed in HAHAHAHA

62375517
its probably going to be one of those 1245-130pm type days

62375524
Crab fucking shits

62375542
I don't even know what to buy right now

62375544
looks like everything is recovering
that dude must be doing his conference

62375550
>>62375542
almost anything is worth buying right now
these are all great entries and might go lower even
i think the big wigs are scared about what the FOMC meeting will say

62375578
>>62375107
>he didn’t buy when it was sub-200
this is why retards never make money here. you faggots are either too reckless or too pussy-footed

62375595
reddit always grossly overestimate the reach of gamma squeezes. there was no way a trillion dollar company would double its price in a couple of minutes. mankind is not rich enough to pump it that far yet

62375597
SpaceX is a sub 25 dollar a share stock

62375604
>>62373337
>me sitting watching the spcx tape live, finger cocked and right to smash that put button at the first sign of weakness

62375610
SpaceX is a 500 dollar company

62375614
its doing it again...

62375676
>>62375614
>its doing it ag-ACK!

62375680
SPCX and KMB are the only green in my portfolio

62375685
>>62375680
cost average?

62375689
I just made $1 on SPCX
I LOVE ELON MUSK

62375690
>>62375107
Good. Somebody needs to buy my bags one day. Stay out.

62375745
algos arent letting anything run today
if somethign significant supposed to be happening or is it just warch fears, which are supposed to be tomorrow

62375758
Nobody is making money off of these oil prices. The only guy making any money off of the changes in price of oil is Baron Trump boss.

62375764
>>62375685
All my shares in SPCX are IPO at $135 and my KMB is at $98.

62375767
>>62375595
Are you talking about SpaceX? Because it more than any other can exactly do that.
This is exactly what the 4% floating is designed for.
This 4% was only 75B at its IPO. You only need to pump that to suddenly make the other remaining 96% pump by as much in %, and thus get le meme multi-trillion valuation and turn it into gazillion valuation.
It's all fucking FAKE and GAY.

62375800
LOL

62375814
>>62375767
>only 75B
what do you mean only?
that's like 10 gamestops, I agree with anon, if retail could gamma squeeze $75b of equities then half of the russel would be squeezing daily

62375840
>>62375800
>June 15th
tweet doesn't exist
https://xcancel.com/AP

62375897
everything is on a uptrend despite the algo interference

62375982
>>62375897
ok i guess i meant just SPCX LOL

62376054
fuck tech and fuck AI, pls keep poisoning the market space bros
t. tech worker

62376066
>>62376054
>he doesn't know spacex is an AI company

62376076
>>62376066
in space tho so it's cooler

item.title: NO NO NO NO NO NO!!!!!!!!!! THIS SIMPLY CANNOT BE! ELON MUSKRAT IS A CONMAN, SPACEX MERELY A PONZI SCHEME!!! SOMEONE MUS… — 36 replies — 144.0/hr

NO NO NO NO NO NO!!!!!!!!!! THIS SIMPLY CANNOT BE! ELON MUSKRAT IS A CONMAN, SPACEX MERELY A PONZI SCHEME!!! SOMEONE MUS…

Open thread • Replies: 36 • Updated: 2026-06-16 17:25 UTC

OP

NO NO NO NO NO NO!!!!!!!!!!

THIS SIMPLY CANNOT BE! ELON MUSKRAT IS A CONMAN, SPACEX MERELY A PONZI SCHEME!!!

SOMEONE MUST PUT A STOP TO THIS NOW!!!!!!!!!!!! REDDIT ARMY RISE UP!!!!!!!!!

Early replies (first 3)

62375140
this is entirely sustainable, you have EDS if you disagree

62375150
>>62375140
Short it then, stupid nigger

62375163
>company called "Space Exploration Technologies"
>run by the first trillionaire

>you STILL didn't buy any of their stock

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62375255
>>62375140
how does this nigger Elon keep doing it man he is seriously the greatest conman of all human history

62375257
>>62375128
But saars influencers on youtube and tiktok told me to fade this ipo!!1!

62375260
>>62375140
Pareto distribution

62375270
>>62375255
He pretends to be a lot dumber than he actually is. There is a ruthless cunning man under that giga autist facade

62375274
I like the company but this valuation simply makes no sense. I suspect the price will be more reasonable after inclusion into indices and the vesting cliff happens.

62375277
>>62375128
Many rupees won sir

62375281
>>62375128
> ELON MUSKRAT IS A CONMAN
Yes, possibly the GOAT conman

62375287
AI bubble has popped, this is the next new brrrrrrrrrrr receptacle

62375291
>>62375287
AI would rise if they just let us make porn.

62375303
its over
time to sell

62375331
>>62375128
I don't really care to be honest, but this is the best example of stock market being fake and gay.

62375340
>>62375274
Tesla's valuation still isn't reasonable

62375393
>>62375140
Those other companies don't have a near monopoly on space. IF Elon can deliver on what he claims, then this stock is cheap. And he has delivered on things that reddit morons said was impossible, more than once.

62375526
>>62375393
The space market is tiny
The space market might be bigger in the future, but in the future there will also be a lot more competition

62375535
>>62375291
This, porn is literally the killer app of AI, but jews dont want every OF demoralisation whore going out of work

62375736
>>62375140
Kek baggie isn’t going to be allowed into Musk’s kingdom.

62375755
>>62375393
what even is there to do in space other than launch satellites? No one is going to the moon, no one is going to mars, no one is building a space station

what even is the point of space

62375776
>>62375755
>what even is there to do in the skies other than fly kites? No one is going to the other side of the planet, no one is going to to leave the boats, no one is building an airport
>what even is the point of skies

62375784
>>62375776
space is gay and a waste of money ngl

just grow up ur supposed to get over the space fantasy at 14

62375809
>marriage and kids are gay, and a waste of money ngl

>just grow up ur supposed to get over the romantic fantasy at 14

62375818
>>62375274
Currently, SpaceX has the monopoly in heavy orbital lift. As soon as they get a valid competitor, the price will suffer its first hiccup.

62375819
>>62375128
What state do you think American leftists are in? Personally, I love Musk for that.

62375820
All of my friends are mentally ill and make money on space exploration technologies corporation btw

62375833
>>62375274
You say this but Tesla has been garbage compared to other EVs for a long time now yet is still worth all of them. I would invest in spcx only because of the Elon cult and on account of him being buddies with the President (what you think the Epstein jab meant anything?), not because of fundamentals.

62375841
>>62375809
This but unironically, not the gotcha you think it is weeb tranny faggot loser

62375898
Give Elon more rupees saars!
Plenty of Bob and Vagene awaits!

62375943
>>62375776
so true sis, now let's see the mcap on airliners

62376171
>>62375128

True
>SPACEX MERELY A PONZI SCHEME!!!
Also true

62376208

62376220
>>62375128
Please post some reddit salt

item.title: KABOOOOOOM! XRP CHART ANALYST PREDICTS THE XRP CAN GO TO $10.000 — 21 replies — 84.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
KABOOOOOOM! XRP CHART ANALYST PREDICTS THE XRP CAN GO TO $10.000

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-06-16 17:16 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62369246
Analyst is a synonym for idiot

62369265
>>62369230
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62369331
>>62369230
Saar is this thread where we goo KABBBOOOOM?

I missed discord meeting saar

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62369346
1XRP= 1M$
Kaboooom
Thanks Joel thanks braddy

62369352
>>62369230
Tranny coin

62369371
$10,000 is fud. That's literally 5 ham sandwiches.

62370904
>>62369230
BOOOOOOOOOOOM

62373711
Everyone in this thread is the same link obsessive who lost the same argument for 10 months straight across 100 threads and is doing this to cope.

62373723
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOM
>>62373711
so fxcking bullish gish gallop

62375957
>>62373723
You might be the maddest person to ever invest.

62375980
>>62373723
>>62375957
I mean, like the most pathologically butthurt and angry with a meth user level of drive to emotionallly ejaculate just how mad you are in low IQ, really counterproductive ways that betray how poorly thought out your investment is. You literally formed your identity around a bad investment you made (link) to such an extent you feel like people calling it out are individually threatening you, and you chose the most jewy, least real utility having, most obvious scam coin possible 7 years after it was obvious they were building a software business fundraising and not even going to flesh out demand for the token beyond announcements that mean nothing to token holders but they know token holders will misunderstand and they can dump directly on them on the basis of.

62375988
>>62369230
>XRP CHART ANALYST

62375990
>no link, citation
>boom meme
just think, if you sold before new years, you would be almost twice as rich.
i hate XRP baggie retards so much.

62375996
>>62375980
BOOOOOOOOOM
When you put it that way I am so fucking bullish holy shit

62376000
so bullish XRP

62376014
>>62375990
so fxcking bxllish

62376051
>>62375996
zero idea what you think this type of messaging does or who you think you're successfully trolling. It just makes you look like a terminally angry faggot.

62376053
If you dont like XRP fuck you

so bullish

62376075
>>62376051
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62376095
>>62376051
if you’re not bullish for xrp you can fuck right off, stupid linkie

62376181
>>62376095
i know it gives you psychic comfort to assume all anti-XRP posts are made by even dumber linkies, but the fact is i hold neither and think you are all incredibly retarded. good job enriching villainous shitcoin founders, i guess.

item.title: Does anyone do CDs — 7 replies — 28.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Does anyone do CDs

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-06-16 17:21 UTC

OP

I have a few 10k coming from a CD soon, what should I go banana into? Don't say spacex,not saying it'll per se be a bad investment but I just hate elongated muskrat. I just want something safe. Maybe a world index idk. Shill to me /biz/

Early replies (first 3)

62376125
>>62376112
SOXL

62376153
ETH

62376165
>I just hate elongated muskrat

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62376167
>>62376112
Go back to rebbit.

62376197
>>62376125
What is soxl?

62376199
>>62376112
keep it in cd
rich people have a lot in cds

62376203
>>62376167
I haven't been on reddit since like epic beard man days. You must be a newfag if cant accurately detect ledditors

item.title: how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEE… — 57 replies — 12.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEE…

Open thread • Replies: 57 • Updated: 2026-06-16 12:52 UTC

OP

how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEET would they be fine with it.. probably not i think they want you to be grinding your job 24/7 and making like 400k a year

Early replies (first 3)

62365550
dating is outdated chud, find something else to focus on

62365555
>>62365550
but i want a gf to watch mobis with, to eat some delicious food, cook together maybe and stuff.. I got a bluray player recently and im building up a collection we could do it together if i had a gf

:(

62365557
>>62365540
a good prostitute in euro cuck land will service you starting from 100$ for 30 mins. Anything else is cope

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62366041
>>62365608
Animal should be allowed to just breed and leave, there is nothing like third parties in the interaction.

62366052
>>62365557
>dude just get herpes with a romanian gypsy in a shitty hotel in the suburbs

kys

62366054
>Women or leveraged, margined silver miners?
Mmmmm...... you're gonna have to get back to me on that bro

62366257
>>62365587
>>62365738
>>62366005
^ This system is outdated, but I've invented a new one. The equation is identical, but the compounding effects of the numerator have been upscaled, personality remains the same. Proximity now has a negative and positive value.

62366581
>>62366052
Yep, sounds incredibly based

62366590
>>62365989
Delusion
Just look at families walking around

62366599
>>62365958
>>62365953
Do you know any married men
And those things can be deal breakers, there are lines/limits

62366630
>>62365540
the only girls that care about careers in 2026 are egg freezing hags. you need just enough money to get to where women are (like the bar or anywhere else) and live somewhere. anything past that is diminishing returns.

62366635
anon don't listen to desperate insecure virgins for dating advice
the world is full of poor women who will date you if you have a good personality
when my wife and I started dating, I was literally unemployed and living with my parents
Now I make more than her but it took me 5 years to get there.

62366639
>>62365555
>I got a bluray player recently and im building up a collection

Dad?

62366677
>>62365608
all of these women made a different man spend thousands and wait months before fucking really makes you ponder

62366728
>>62366599
well eventually these kinds of women also tend to be single mothers

62367007
>>62365897
Yes paradoxically the girls that are most wife material aren't the ones going around looking to date. I think if you are out of school you're out of luck
>Girlfriend through connections
I know this sounds stupid, but I'd feel like a cuck if I met my girlfriend through a mutual.
Think about it, MY girlfriend would have been interested in talking to someone else FIRST. I wouldn't want to date a girl with guy friends anyways

Impossible propositions are abound

62367017
>>62366635
Do the math.

62367050
>>62367007
Yeah, that’s pretty retarded.
There are plenty of non-sexual reasons why a guy might know some other girl, like a family member, girlfriend/wife’s friend, former co-worker, former school friend.
You could make friends with girls to try to date one of their friends too.
The crux is on your ability to be a normal person to any normal person regardless of gender or age.
That’s how you find girls who aren’t sluts and divorce rapists. Not how you sleep around though.
So you have to figure out if what you really want is someone to have sex with regularly, or someone to start a family with. Because it’s a lot of social effort.

62367055
>>62367007
I just realized, you may have severely low self esteem if you can’t handle the thought of a gf talking to someone else before you.
Low self esteem is girl repellant
Fix that first

62367080
>>62365555
Checked and damn feels bad, I hope you make it.

>>62365540
Former sex haver here, if she loves you not much. Unironically you could go have a picnic with some bullshit like pizza, or go on a road trip. Strategic use of money is ideal. Don't just buy flowers, get them delivered to her work so all her coworkers get pissed and jealous. You want enough money to lock down a nice wedding and kids but thats really it, this was my fatal mistake. I have enough for three weddings now but opportunities are gone for me.

62367870
I get 1k CAD neetbux and do just fine
If not a demo thread, you're overthinking it retard

62367927
>>62365555
unironically, where are the lazy NEET gfs?

62368381
>>62365555
I just want to watch gun boat ball 2 wit my aspie unicorn believing gf turned housewife mommy with fear of scrutiny. I guess i was born too late

62368990
>>62367050
>>62367055
Think about it though. If a girl has tons of guy friends, that's a pretty clear no signal right?
>Low self esteem
true :(

62369133
>>62368990
>>62368990
You can make friends with women too anon. Women that you aren't interested in can have friends that you are interested in.

Also girls can have guy friends that they don't wanna fuck.

Unironically truely befriend a lesbian, this will teach you how to act around women without acting like a retard as you won't try to fuck her.

Also if you're so insecure talk to a therapist/take shrooms and start working out. Its all ego that you have to let go in the end.

Good luck fren!

62369150
All the matches I got on tinder is 30s post wall roast, I can’t believe the 28yi tinder matches something literally call me old hag when I’m just a 35yo bald, obese, needy, short, no STEM degree, and potentially impotent.

62369226
>>62365540
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62369807
>>62365540
Elon is worth $1,000,000,000,000 and still can't find a woman that wants to stay with him

62371591
>>62369133
> take shrooms
Based

>>62368990
You’re letting your insecurities delude you.

62371912
>>62365555
you sound like a retard

62371972
>>62369133
>Also girls can have guy friends that they don't wanna fuck.
even if this is the case the guy most likely wants to fuck them you retard.

part of being in a relationship is having a basic level of respect for your partner. that means dropping all single behaviour, so no hanging out 1 on 1 with the opposite sex, no texting other guys, and no getting drunk without you in bars/clubs. its not insecurity to expect a the most basic of relationship boundaries.

>just take drugs bro!
>go pay money to a millenial woman
holy bluepilled retard

62373795
>>62369807
tbf net worth is not how much money you have

62374837
>>62371972
You're correct that having boundaries isn't insecurity, but not trying to ask your friends if they know a single girl because you believe she talked to your friend is deeply insecure. No one here was talking about behavior after meeting, this dude won't even want to speak to a girl that would've known a male friend
NGMI behavior

item.title: (srs post) thoughts on my nostradamus'ing? Good? Meh? Dumb? — 33 replies — 12.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
(srs post) thoughts on my nostradamus'ing? Good? Meh? Dumb?

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-06-16 14:46 UTC

OP

June 11: chop as market gets ready for pump on spacex trading day

June 12 - June 16: iran FUD is metabolized and market goes up on spacex


June 17 - June 22: FOMC on June 16 EOD causes fud, plus more iran fears

June 22 - Oct 10: NDQ floats upwards 40% while S&P chops and eventually goes up 10%

Oct 10: NDQ reaches a generational top - OpenAI IPOs - Fed announces more hikes due to AI labor inflation - republicans lose congress making trump a lame duck president = no more stimulus grift to pump markets
Oct 10, 2026 - ~Oct 10 2027: as a consequence of the lame duck presidency and the lack of stimulus and the selling of AI venture capital bags onto retail, S&P sells off 40% to round trip all the way back down to 5000

~Oct 10 2027: anthropic ipos

~Oct 10 2027 onwards: pretty much a new 20 year cycle begins and most likely the end of humanity as we birth sentience of machines.

Early replies (first 3)

62349969
you need to factor in the wc which is the biggest npc bread & circus event in modern history

62349972
>>62349960
i just matched up the timelines for 1973 and 2000 btw, that's where I'm getting the play by play for things. I reckon the trading AI's are probably averaging the two together given the macro environment

62349980
>>62349969
ah good point, ya so that might erase the june 17 - june 22 fud period and we go straight into june 22 - oct 10 period

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62350015
>>62349960
Eh. I think they'll just turn shit up to 11 because Bank of America lost.

62352238
biz, so far my prediction is working, stop posting on 1pbtid pepe threads, and let me know if my predictions are shit or not

62353716
snailposting this shit since you retards only want to respond to 1pbtid's

62353764
>>62353716
It'll be a lost decade. It'll take 5-7 years for first new nuclear reactors to come online to unclog the the backlog of ai data centers that will be getting shit canned later this year or next after the crash.

Commodities will be the main play. World needs real resources to build infrastructure and robots. Shit doesn't mine itself out of the ground.

62353866
>>62353764
thanks, yea, seems to be that way. Right around 1973 market peak to 1975ish, gold picked up a 2x bid, so I imagine other commodities would follow suit

It's hard to imagine though, because I look around and I still to this day don't see labor inflation, yet everyone is speaking about how all this build out is happening. If it's happening, why doesn't it show up in labor? That's the first bottleneck that'll show up, no? It showed up in 08, are we saying all the mining and manufacturing just simply doesn't require that many humans? That seems a little bit farfetched to me

62355245
>>62349960
elf

62359675
snailposting this shit since you retards only want to respond to 1pbtid's x2

62359708

62359749
>>62359675
what do you want to hear? the market will go up or go down. your doom pronouncement is stupid since people have been predicting the apocalypse for thousands of years and have always been wrong. also LLMs are gay and AI companies deserve to be buried in piracy and antitrust lawsuits by the next administration. I hope every AI ceo ends up in jail

62359780
>>62359708

62359931
>>62359749

62359962

7*4 = 28 and they get the satisfaction of destroying a holiday. Will also hand everything to the dems in the next election.

62359991
>>62349960

62359998
>>62359991

62361834

62361911

item.title: OMGOMGOMGOMG IT HASNT DUMPED WITHIN THE first FULL DAY OF TRADING ITS GOING UP FOREVER AND ALWAYS NO BRAKES ON THIS TRAI… — 29 replies — 11.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
OMGOMGOMGOMG IT HASNT DUMPED WITHIN THE first FULL DAY OF TRADING ITS GOING UP FOREVER AND ALWAYS NO BRAKES ON THIS TRAI…

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-06-16 14:49 UTC

OP

OMGOMGOMGOMG IT HASNT DUMPED WITHIN THE first FULL DAY OF TRADING ITS GOING UP FOREVER AND ALWAYS NO BRAKES ON THIS TRAIN UP ONLY FOREVER!!! MONEY ISNT REAL. ROCKETS ARE!!!!
>1 TRILLION mARKET CAP
>2 TRILLION MARPET KAP
>U R HER
>3 TRILLIONAIRES
>10 TRILIONIES
>100 TRILLIONZES

Early replies (first 3)

62372684
Strap in, we're going to the moon.

62372691
>>62372673
Can anyone tell me exactly what space x is supposed to be doing?
Mining on the moon?

62372703
>>62372691
I can't believe this needs to be explained but the answer is AI. They said they will build data centers in space and that's all that is needed.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62372710
>>62372691
Mining on mars with robots. No regulatory agencies have the technology to regulate on mars so the sheer number of resources that can be obtained will be substantial. The moon is to be a launchpad.

62372747
>>62372703
>>62372710
>data centers in space
>robot mining on Mars
Amazing, does that happen before or after we get fully autonomous self-driving teslas? Maybe he'll build a hyperloop, but for rockets - that way the minerals are transported faster. I'm so heckin excited guys

62372748
>>62372673
He was right, SpaceX really is driving the goyim insane. They can't handle it and are making threads like this now.

62372768
>>62372691

62372772
>>62372691
lining the pockets of institutional investors

62372779
>>62372747
It looks like famine is next. Anyhoo, the datacenter craze is just a thing to allocate land and utilities to future projects. Most of those won't actually be data centers. A lot of them are going to be neocities. Others to be massive industrial plants. It's just this way they can be allocated funds and space without having to go into details about their data center that isn't a data center project. One of the jokes is that the emissions and usage data used to smear data centers are actually just city data. So it's people arguing against having cities because of the environmental impact.

62372794
>>62372691
SpaceX(and all other X companies which Elon wants to eventually merge together) is trying to become become the irl Wayland Yutani, excluding all the biotech/synth/ayylmao stuff

62372825
>>62372794
>excluding all the biotech/synth/ayylmao
It'll definitely include biotech and synths (neuralink and XAI)

62372894
200, 300 next losers lmao

62372951
>>62372691
>Can anyone tell me exactly what space x is supposed to be doing?
printing infinite money, apparently

>Amazing, does that happen before or after we get fully autonomous self-driving teslas? Maybe he'll build a hyperloop, but for rockets - that way the minerals are transported faster. I'm so heckin excited guys
lamao
maybe he can first make a non-crap car (here on Earth)

62373030
>>62372673
Honestly it could go to $1k. Why? Because only 5% of the shares are being traded. It's a trillion dollar market cap but only trading $100 billion worth of shares.
It will only be unsustainable for companies to pump it when they start unlocking the smelly 20% and 28% investor lockups.
The first days when only 5% of shares are traded will be the most profitable for companies to scam pump and pin the price higher because it's easier to do it.

62373088
>>62372673

62373570
>>62372673

62373577
How do I short this?

62373893
>>62372684

62373947
Goyim are literally going to rope en masse when it doesn’t crash

62373982
>>62372673
Elon will be a quadrillionaire EOW
Screencap this

62374014
>>62372691
Does it matter. The stock market is all rigged, none of it makes sense. Learn to read the tea-leaves and do the best you can

62374065
are we still dealing in the real world, fellow goyim?

62374074
>>62372673
Haha i recognize that frustration from trying to short TSLA ages ago. Just accept that the market is phony balony, dont do the rational thing just go along with trends regardless of how regarded it is

62374084
>62374074
nice b8 m8

62375254
>>62372691
The same thing Musk did with Tesla. Pump the stock and use the stock to expand his business empire.

For example, he used Tesla stock to acquire SolarCity in an all-stock deal. He used Tesla's stock to acquire Twitter by using Tesla stock as collateral for loans. He's now using SpaceX stock to acquire Anysphere in an all-stock deal.

62375269
>>62372673
Don't expect it to dump for a while. Index funds will be forced to start buying soon. Flippers are penalized for 14-30 days. Insiders are not fully free to sell for 180 days.

62375311
>>62375269
>flippers are penalized
oh no can’t buy that next hype IPO which is …. ?

62375448
>>62375311
Anthropic and OpenAI immediately come to mind.

IPOs happen all the time. According to the SEC, there were 374 IPOs in 2025, and total proceeds were $70B
https://www.sec.gov/data-research/statistics-data-visualizations/initial-public-offerings-ipos

item.title: Investing in Sex Robots & Aritifical Womb Technology — 4 replies — 8.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Investing in Sex Robots & Aritifical Womb Technology

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-06-16 17:00 UTC

OP

This will be one of the greatest investment opportunities in our lifetime within another decade or so.

Tech is stagnating, just as every other industry is out of viable optimization methodologies. There is nothing new being created, every niche is saturated and optimized. AI will produce some value but it is ultimately a giant bubble that will never, and I mean never advance to the point of consciousness or intelligence (unless they use biological brains and do so correctly - they will fail). Science doesn't even know where consciousness comes.

That being said: sex robots and eventual artificial womb tech (much easier than actually creating consciousness) will be the big new technology that solves real world problems. And the funny thing is: tech companies will eventually run out of other means of generating increasing revenue and will essentially HAVE to go this route, just like they're currently doing with AI. They have nothing else. This technology will have vast and continuous demand as it will entirely replace the old/current paradigm.

Early replies (first 3)

62375864
>>62375553
I want sexbots to be real so bad

62375914
>>62375864
same
all the despair, pain and unhappiness i feel... if it was a good sexbot i would be happy.
the thing is, the first sexbots will be bad. like truly awful. probably not physically dangerous... maybe. but not enjoyable. like how electric masturbators are really good at making me nut, but a soulless experience that leaves me feeling empty. the technology to replace a living organism with a robot is just not there.
if it were viable, there would be news. most people who are lonely and horny want the sexbot. but porn and masturbators are the best we have. sexbots are an AI complete problem.

62375977
>>62375553
>sex robots and eventual artificial womb tech (much easier than actually creating consciousness)
AI is not about creating consciousness. you are retarded if you think intelligence requires consciousness.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62376084
>>62375977
"AI" is just a number of algos operating within a matrix of data to produce output similar to some complex bot. AI is NOT intelligent, it is a pseudo-thinking automation.
>When faced with novel scenarios that deviate from training patterns (e.g., a simple detour in a known city map), these systems often fail spectacularly, revealing they lack a coherent mental model of reality.
consciousness, or something tantamount to it, is the only thing that can transform AI from rote, confined calculation machines into actual thinking machines. Scientists will never be able to replicate this.

item.title: How do I invest in a country? >Work in maritime safety data >notice that there has been a fuckton of notices for pipelin… — 12 replies — 7.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
How do I invest in a country? >Work in maritime safety data >notice that there has been a fuckton of notices for pipelin…

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-06-16 15:54 UTC

OP

How do I invest in a country?
>Work in maritime safety data
>notice that there has been a fuckton of notices for pipeline building and hydrographic surveying and cable laying in fucking Guyana, South America
>they found a bunch of oil or some shit, like a bunch a bunch
>US is putting out these notices to Mariner about all these operations (public) which is probably just the tip of the Ice(berg)
>there are survey and research vessels flying under the flag of fucking Luxembourg (weird) and some uncrewed surface vessels as well
Guyana is probably about to skyrocket in wealth. As such I believe the US is going to get very involved in that area of the world, as it shares a border with Venezuela. I am wondering if this is the reason why we grabbed Maduro in the first place
Forgot to mention: in 2023 Maduro tried to claim like 2/3rds of Guyana. Guyana is projected to export 1.3 million barrels of oil a day in 2027.

Early replies (first 3)

62375065
>they found a bunch of oil or some shit, like a bunch a bunch

Why is everyone speaking like an african american gettho dweller nowadays? i can't stand it.
The west need to be mentally deniggerified

62375077
Whatever you're thinking, it's already priced in. Doesn't matter when or where. Everything is priced in and it's impossible to make money anywhere using publicly available information. Hope that helps.

62375105
Last time I saw a post similar to this one the stock did a 7x and I made a clean 2x. I will never fade.
Let's find out how to make money from this boys

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62375157
>>62374990
We need to identify whichever companies will get to benefit from this.
Which investable company is:
>getting the contract to extract those
>deploying the surrounding infrastructure
>supplying the resources to deploy the infrastructure
>running the shipping in and out
We identify any one of these with a modicum of certainty and we can make some money

62375161
>>62374990
>How do I invest in a country?
Start a 3 days special operation and plant a loyal political elite.

62375171
>>62374990
Venezuela has claimed 2/3 of Guyana for 200 years. Maduro merely reaffirmed this.

62375173
>>62375065
I type like that because it makes autists bump my threads

62375184
>>62375161
Don't forget to impose a naval blockade and only let through ships if payments are deposited the in the bank account of your choice. Also don't forget to threaten to kill everyone if they don't stay loyal (source: Delcy Rodriguez herself)

62375267
>>62374990
Damn, that's pretty cool. Honestly probably best way would be buying property, maybe even property in Venezuela once it become possible.

I think if Vance/Rubio win in 2028, South America will skyrocket in property value and tourism

62375339
>>62374990
Bro, don't invest in third world shitholes
Their governments are notorious for scamming international investors out of their money, that's why they are so poor

62375522
>>62374990
>Maduro tried to grab 2/3 of Guyana
Unirconically the one time he was right. All that land belongs to Venezuela and was stolen by the UK.

62375741
>>62374990
I doubt Guyana is developed enough to have a real "stock market". Invest by proximity - companies operating in Guyana that will profit from it's boom

item.title: I talked to two people today about rent. — 121 replies — 31.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
I talked to two people today about rent.

Open thread • Replies: 121 • Updated: 2026-06-16 13:36 UTC

OP

I talked to two people today about rent.

The first guy said he lives in Atlanta and pays about $2,300 a month in rent. I mentioned that works out to roughly $27,600 a year, which I personally think is a lot for rent. He also told me he was let go from a sales job at a small company about two weeks ago. Small company = low pay. When I commented on the rent being high, he responded by saying, “maybe it is a lot for you.”

I told him it is a terrible financial decision.
I also told him that I live in a major city and my monthly taxes alone are more than that.

Later, I spoke with another guy who pays around $2,000 a month for a luxury apartment. That’s about $24,000 a year. I didn’t ask about his income or job situation, but I shared that I thought the annual rent cost seemed very high.

I kept telling him his rent was a waste of money and he should buy a house. He told me he might not want to to live somewhere for so long. I asked him how he expected to build wealth. The conversation went back and forth with me saying it was a waste of “money down the drain.” He eventually admitted it was hard and bad use of money and insulted me with “life is hard when YOU don’t live in mommies basement.”
Wow.
He is literally throwing money down the drain and I trying to give me good advice.

It made me wonder if people commonly spend over $20,000–$30,000 a year on rent? And if so, how common is that relative to income and lifestyle choices?

Please look at picrel. Do people spend so much of their paycheque on rent? How does anyone become rich?

Curious what others think about this.

Early replies (first 3)

62372611
>>62372604
>I talked to two people today about rent.
no you didn't

62372621
>$24k per year rent is throwing money down the drain
>$50k per year interest payments for 30 years to "own" the same thing is building wealth

Lol

Lmao

62372624
>>62372604

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62373566
>>62373548
>Yeah if I met this fool in real life
that implies he goes outside

62373568
>>62373339
>>62373330
>>62373351
>>62373407
If real estate is such a no-brainer then why are you so defensive about it?

62373571
>>62373556
>>62373560
the rich buy homes as vanity projects, but they didn't become rich because they own a home. not spending money (which is the exact opposite of home ownership btw) is only a way to delay or reduce financial disaster. the only way to make financial gains is to increase income

62373573
>>62373543
I have these conversations outside the gym, doesn’t mean I should post on /fit/. Wtf are you talking about? I take my competitive gaming seriously during the evenings.

62373575
>>62373566
good point. He's here more often than I am and I'm here a lot

62373579
>>62373568
Cause you are fucking ignorant.
Sure home prices rise and drop, but during downturns, you really get to see which areas were valueable. Your cope is renting, which I have nothing against but to pretend home ownership is worthless is peak cope.

62373581
>>62373573
I don't think you do take it seriously
You were playing games in this very thread. is posting here not a distraction?

62373586
>>62373568
It ISNT a no brainer anymore.
That’s where the k shaped economy comes in. Owning a house comfortably in the top 10% means the bottom 90% are already far behind and falling farther behind each quarter.

62373589
>>62373581
?
I take my gaming seriously since the game is competitive and ranked and fun.
I am locked in each evening.

62373592
>>62373571
Once again, wealth gap. 2026 is fucking crazy.
Dollar down, stocks up. But people have no ownership of anything. Wasn’t “own nothing and be happy” part of agenda 2030?

62373594
>>62373102
>>62373589
arguing with poor brokies is locking in.
really?

62373595
>>62373566
You go outside to let the bull in.

62373597
Daily autistic browncel thread

62373598
>>62373594
I ain’t arguing in a game, wtf are you talking about?

62373600
>>62373595
you're a worthless piece of shit and people here are tired of you

62373604
>>62373594
That post was at 10pm…
My conversations today were around 3pm. What the fuck are you on?
Discuss topic in op or fuck off.

62373607
>>62373600
Ok, just don’t keep the bull waiting.

62373616
>>62373598
you were arguing on /biz/, then off playing a match?
did that not happen?
>>62373607
that post was for me what are you doing?

62373618
Good thread op.

62373626
>>62373618
samefag fail

you never seem to figure out ID's

we can see how many times you respond to yourself.

62373639
>>62373626
/thread

62373643
>>62373616
I wasn’t arguing on /biz/. I was discussing business and finance with other anons. Why are you here?

62373726
OP is a fat retard who probably stinks to high hell

62373757
>>62373618
lol what a humiliating samefag

62373789
>>62372604
>Average American home requires an income over $200k a year
Grim

62373858
>>62373789
To live away from certain “people,” yeah.

62374484
>>62372611
this thread was posted by a mentally ill discord tranny who previously nameniggered as OCPD. he posts this crap 12+ hour a day, every day. he frequently uses the leto furfag residential VPN shitposting front end to change IDs and reply to his own posts.

62374504
>>62373618
oh man lol. Why are you posting these almost every day? You sound insufferable. Go back.

62374657
>>62372621
What? My whole mortage is only 15k per year

62374661
>>62372604
It's very common for people to be rentslaves or house-poor their entire lives because they've been psyop shamed into avoiding living with their own family.

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 32 replies — 20.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 32 • Updated: 2026-06-16 15:51 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62373803
>>62373772
You are posting anime. NGMI.

62373818
>>62373772
>>62373799
>>62373803
I hope you all have less than $10k

62373831
>tripfag is a brokie

Color me surprised.

62373838
>>62373818
I am 47 and I make $165k a year. Seethe.

62373864
>>62373838
Funny, I'm 27. A 20 year gap. Wouldn't mind being 17 again.

62373866
>>62373803
Posting animu has been a very effective method to gatekeep and single out posters which do not belong. You need to go back.
>>62373798
I wanted to propose pic related. Her name's in the filename and is practically a dead meme from an era long past. We already have pink wojaks so there's already some cross pollination plus there's a good chunk of her content being collected in a booru.

62373871
>>62373866
Okay, bro. Go gatekeep /reddit

62373881
>>62373752
I made the six figure club with stocks and crypto. Lost most of it. Now I’m trying to make it again and more with just stocks after a long hiatus. I realized I’ve been over diversifying. Growing a small account fast will require fewer but larger bets. And patience for a good entry.

62373888
>>62373866
Okay
First order of business settled.

Next order of business.

$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$

Let's brainstorm. I think we should find something to learn. This thing can't be too mainstream, can't be too complex for our brains, and must be fun enough to encourage people to come back to these threads. We shall do this [subject] for x amount of threads and if NOTHING substantial comes from it, we move on to a new [subject]

62373902
>>62373888
I've seen a couple of drawfags post on /biz/ with a pressing question about how to monetize their art. What I'm about to suggest will definitely delete these threads because it involves a venture which for whatever reason jannies/mods will see it as "advertising" some personal project. If you're serious about starting a fun /biz/ related hobby we should brainstorm elsewhere without interference.

62373918
>>62373902
Will you stop crying about jannies??????

I will go ahead and do the brainstorming since you're terrified of the meek. Your cowardice is really annoying. Like you're begging them to delete it, first post in this thread and it's you putting ideas into the heads of jannies.

Give me one moment while I gather my thoughts, it might take a few minutes as I'd like to lay out multiple ventures that will appeal to a wide amount of sensibilities and then we will converge on one.

62373951
I have to wage in the morning.
It's too much to ask for this thread to last until then.
So for now, we have accomplished one thing.

I shall go to bed and tomorrow we will begin discussing various money making opportunities. I will try to put myself into as many different shoes as I can. Can millions be made? Unlikely. Can $1 be made? VERY likely. Goodnight anons.

62373961
>>62373951
Yeah it's about that time for me too, but I still think we should really start a group elsewhere.

62374042
>>62373866
>>62373881
>>62373888
>>62373918
>>62373951
>>62373961

Kys’selves anime fags

62374054
>>62373752
>devise ways to gain a spot at the table
DCA crypto. It's literally your only hope. Good luck.

62374086
>>62373752
>In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.
I'm in the six figure club. Six figure salary, six figure portfolio. There is no six figure club, six figures isn't enough to do anything, your life doesn't change. You still have to wageslave like any other poorfag.

62374140
We buy and hold sealed Pokémon card booster boxes

62374144
>>62373866
>Posting animu has been a very effective method to gatekeep
True!

>>62373881
I came to a similar realization, being diversified just isn't going to help me get rich fast. I need less plays and they need to succeed well.

62374193
>>62373752
what stocks are we buying

62374471
>>62373752
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62374533
anyone wants to learn about photonics? some stocks in that area have gone ballistic, i'm talking 10000% returns in 4 years

62374614
>>62373752
$8k nw fag reporting in

I bought spacex at ATH so I'm doing to 3-fig nw pretty soon wish me luck

62374764
>>62374614
whats the thinking process behing going all in in spcx? i am just curious

62374781
>>62373752
Based /x/ anon, keep fighting the good fight, and if you get something going please fucking pump my Cheese bags.

62374835
>4 figure club thread
>half the posts are animeposters
Many such cases

62374867
>>62373798
Mah nigga this is just Gabriel-chan. She's a neet that didn't do shit about her angelic job, her demon friends started helping her out. Yes, she will be a perfect base for our mascot.

62374886
>>62373888
Based trips.

>Next order of business.
>$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$

The way i see it, you guys need to learn how to DCA. That is easy, just buy whatever you want on monthly basis. The thing that we need to understand is: which ones to buy? Well I find that /smg/ threads are great for that.

>But we're poorfags who cant even invest 100 bucks on something
Yea, me too son, me too

62375712
>>62373752
how to make money as a poorfag /biz/raeli guide:
>prolific ai shit. bery klaustrophian
>work a wage job
>lie cheat and steal; have no remorse about it
>a penny saved is a penny earned. literally.
>unlearn your poorfag tendencies and your scarcity mindset trauma
>steal from homeless people
>street busking on off days
put everything on the stock market. fuck crypto.
>don't cheap out on food though. good nutrition makes for better decisions
>if ur on meds, start selling them
>dont be an autist who views the law as an unbreakable fact of life.
>get into options trading if you can. read the options playbook
>stfu about your money adventures
>SHUT THE FUCK UP ABOUT MONEY
>DO NOT TELL ANY1 IRL ABOUT WHAT YOU'RE DOING

62375724
>>62374533
QUBT,RGTI,IONQ

i had cheap entry prices but sold too early. now i want to kill myself

item.title: What made you still hold BTC? — 23 replies — 14.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
What made you still hold BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-06-16 15:50 UTC

OP

Bitcoin has gone through multiple cycles, crashes, and endless criticism, yet many continue to hold. What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

Early replies (first 3)

62371733
>>62371718
>What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

62371807
The only reason to ever sell bitcoin is to buy more at a lower price.

62371917
>>62371807
correct
>waiting for a good entry

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62372043
If you look at the last 5 years, half of the time BTC was higher than it is now.

The Nasdaq only goes up and is 2x since 5 years.

BTC won't explode 10x from here, if you're in crypto you want huge gains. We're gambling. BTC is boring and you don't even have a good reason for why it will outperform an NFT. It certainly has 30x the risk.

62372051
>>62372043
I wanted to say an ETF, but yeah I also don't know if it will outperform bored apes desu.

If you buy crypto, gamble properly.
If you don't want to gamble, buy an ETF.

62372056
>>62371718
Are they going to stop printing money?

62372059
>>62372043
My boomer father, who invested a big chunk of his portfolio in btc a couple years ago near its low, is now exiting. I think that's as good a sign as any that it's over for bitcope

62372126
>>62371733
Neither is the internet, yet here we are.

62372189
>>62371718
Unwavering belief that BTC is how WAGMI.

62372279
It's like a runescape party hat without the duplication glitch.

62372380
>>62371718
BTC was created by kraken, coinbase and binance in 2017. Upon launch they confused their users into thinking this new asset was Bitcoin. They did this to convince miners to chase profit on a minority fork. Miners are understood to be the adopters, voters and stewards of the technology. Getting the majority hashrate onto the new fork was imperative. It worked flawlessly with miners abandoning Bitcoin to mine this new handicapped network called BTC. My conviction remains with Bitcoin, the only tech that can elevate humanity. BTC is not Bitcoin.

62372396
Its not, I bought and sold like 10 times

62372419
>>62371718
I'm a bagholder since 2018. I got some returns but I'm obviously not happy. Still much better than my Link bag which is a disaster. I always notice trends too late, being hyperliquid the latest one i missed. Still bought at 62 and will try to sell at 70+.
Unironically, hype seems the only crypto i have more faith atm even though I got like 4k riding.
My BTC bag is worth 200k atm. Sucks.
Also, i started diversifying into Nasdaq and sp500 i lost faith on BTC being he fastest vehicle and i think next bull run we'll be very lucky if we even reach 180k top. We probably get front runned at 140-150k. Still I'll be dropping heavily my bags then

62372448
>>62371718
Truly decentralised money

62372468
>>62372051
The problem with NFTs is how they have such a small market cap while being extremely illiquid on top of that. Any shitcoin ranked #320 on CoinGecko has a higher market cap than Pudgy Penguins, and 50x to 100x its trading volume. That’s an automatic turn-off for any whale that would want to invest millions in the top NFTs. These bags would be hard to sell at the right moment.

62372501
>>62372380
>mfw the real Bitcoin is only $226 today

62372915
>>62372501
>>mfw the real Bitcoin is only $226 today
lol!
bcash cucks BTFO
>we don't need POW, we will have 10-block "finalisation rule!!!"
wow, just as Satoshi intended! lamao.

62373544
>>62371807
Everyone has that plan until Bitcoin decides to never give them their entry back.

62373685
>>62372056
no, they're going to print more for the US and going to bail out the cash strapped holders of US bonds with swap lines

62374097
>>62371917
What's your entry price?

62374451
>>62372043
Depends what you're optimizing for. Some people want the next 100x. Others are happy finding ways to make their BTC a bit more productive without giving up exposure entirely.

62375554
>>62372051
Maybe, but doesn't the ETF route introduce a different trade-off?

62375717
Nice triple post faglord
